providers.name: 2embed
providers.customizations: Supports full season embeds and a comprehensive JSON metadata API.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://www.2embed.cc

### Embed Example
https://www.2embed.cc/embed/129

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `https://www.2embed.cc/embed/{id}`
- **TV Series**: `https://www.2embed.cc/embedtv/{id}&s={season}&e={episode}`
- **Full TV Seasons**: `https://www.2embed.cc/embedtvfull/{id}`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB ID (Numeric)
- IMDB ID (Prefix `tt...`)

### Query Parameters
- `s`: Season number (Required for TV episodes)
- `e`: Episode number (Required for TV episodes)

### Player Events / PostMessage API
Not documented.

### Integration Notes
- Supports a separate JSON API at `https://api.2embed.cc` for metadata, trending, and search.
- Official domains include `.cc` and `.skin`.

providers.name: 2embed.stream
providers.customizations: Offers a universal `iframe.php` endpoint for automatic content type detection.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://2embed.stream

### Embed Example
https://www.2embed.stream/embed/movie/129

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `https://www.2embed.stream/embed/movie/{id}`
- **TV Series**: `https://www.2embed.stream/embed/tv/{id}/{season}/{episode}`
- **Universal Redirect**: `https://www.2embed.stream/iframe.php?id={id}` (Auto-detects content type)

### Supported IDs
- TMDB ID (Numeric)
- IMDB ID (Prefix `tt...`)

### Query Parameters
- `id`: Used in the `iframe.php` endpoint to identify the content.

### Player Events / PostMessage API
Not documented.

### Integration Notes
- The service is a content aggregator and does not host files.
- If `2embed.stream` is down, the provider suggests switching to `2embed.online`.

providers.name: AeonWatch
providers.customizations: Advanced TV controls including AutoNext and customizable poster/autoplay settings.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://thisiscinema.pages.dev

### Embed Example
https://thisiscinema.pages.dev/?type=movie&version=v3&id=129

### URL Structure
All embeds are handled via query parameters on the root page:
- **Movies**: `/?type=movie&version={v}&id={id}`
- **TV Series**: `/?type=tv&version={v}&id={id}&season={s}&episode={e}`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB ID (Numeric) - **Required for AutoNext feature**
- IMDB ID (Prefix `tt...`)

### Query Parameters
- `type` (Required): `movie` or `tv`
- `version` (Required): `v2` or `v3`
- `id` (Required): TMDB or IMDB identifier
- `season` (Required for TV): Season number
- `episode` (Required for TV): Episode number
- `poster`: `true` | `false` (Show/hide poster)
- `autoPlay`: `true` | `false` (Start playback automatically)
- `autoNext` (TV only): `true` | `false` (Auto-advance episodes)
- `showAutoNextButton` (TV only): `true` | `false` (Display toggle on page)
- `totep` (TV only): Total episodes in season (Required for AutoNext)
- `tsn` (TV only): Total seasons in show (Required for AutoNext)

### Player Events / PostMessage API
Not documented.

### Integration Notes
- **AutoNext** functionality strictly requires TMDB numeric IDs and the `totep`/`tsn` parameters.
- Recommended to use a local static server when testing to avoid CORS and nested iframe issues.

providers.name: Cinemaos
providers.customizations: None documented.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://cinemaos.tech
- Embed Example: https://cinemaos.tech/player/129
- URL Structure: 
  - Movies: `https://cinemaos.tech/player/{tmdb_id}`
  - TV Shows: `https://cinemaos.tech/player/{tmdb_id}/{season_number}/{episode_number}`
- Supported IDs: TMDB, IMDB
- Query Parameters: None documented
- Player Events / PostMessage API: None documented
- Integration Notes: 
  - Responsive player for Desktop, Mobile, and Tablet
  - High quality streams (mostly 1080p)
  - Automatic link updates for quality improvements

providers.name: CineSRC
providers.customizations: Custom back button, auto-next episode toggle, and automatic intro skipping.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://cinesrc.st
- Embed Example: https://cinesrc.st/embed/movie/129
- URL Structure: 
  - Movies: `https://cinesrc.st/embed/movie/{tmdb_id}`
  - TV Shows: `https://cinesrc.st/embed/tv/{tmdb_id}?s={season}&e={episode}`
- Supported IDs: TMDB
- Query Parameters: 
  - `back`: URL for the top-left back button (e.g., `?back=https://yoursite.com`)
  - `autonext`: Disable automatic episode advancement (`?autonext=false`)
  - `autoskip`: Automatically skip intros (`?autoskip=true`)
- Player Events / PostMessage API: 
  - Uses `postMessage` for communication
  - Events: `cinesrc:response` (for getter methods), `cinesrc:error` (for stream failures)
- Integration Notes: 
  - Iframe permissions: `allow="autoplay; fullscreen; picture-in-picture"`
  - Security: Always verify `event.origin` when listening to postMessage
  - Layout: Use responsive containers with `aspect-ratio`

providers.name: Cinezo API
providers.customizations: Extensive UI customization including primary/secondary colors, subtitle fonts, and toggleable player controls.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://player.cinezo.live

### Embed Example
https://player.cinezo.live/embed/movie/129

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `/embed/movie/{tmdbId}`
- **TV Shows**: `/embed/tv/{tmdbId}/{season}/{episode}`
- **Anime**: `/embed/anime/{anilistId}/{number}`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB (Movies & TV)
- AniList (Anime)

### Query Parameters
- `primarycolor`: Main player color theme (e.g., `e8b86d`)
- `secondarycolor`: Secondary accent color (e.g., `c49de8`)
- `iconcolor`: Color of player icons (e.g., `ffffff`)
- `autoplay`: Auto-play on load (`true`/`false`)
- `poster`: Show movie poster (`true`/`false`)
- `chromecast`: Enable Chromecast support (`true`/`false`)
- `servericon`: Show server selection button (`true`/`false`)
- `setting`: Show player settings button (`true`/`false`)
- `pip`: Enable Picture-in-Picture mode (`true`/`false`)
- `font`: Subtitle font family (e.g., `Roboto`)
- `fontcolor`: Subtitle text color (e.g., `e8b86d`)
- `fontsize`: Subtitle font size in pixels (e.g., `20`)
- `opacity`: Subtitle opacity 0–1 (e.g., `0.8`)
- `logourl`: Custom logo URL
- `server`: Server name or number for playback (e.g., `hindi`)
- `dub`: For anime, audio preference (`true`/`false`)

### Player Events / PostMessage API
- **Progress Tracking**: The player supports an event-driven system for monitoring playback progress, including events for `play`, `pause`, and `seeked`.

### Integration Notes
- Use an `<iframe>` for embedding.
- Supports highly customizable UI via query parameters.

providers.name: MoviesAPI
providers.customizations: Responsive player with multiple server options and a discovery API for content listing.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://moviesapi.club

### Embed Example
https://moviesapi.club/movie/129

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `https://moviesapi.club/movie/{id}`
- **TV Shows**: `https://moviesapi.club/tv/{id}-{season}-{episode}`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB
- IMDB

### Query Parameters
**Discovery API Parameters:**
- `page`: Page number (Default: 1)
- `resultsPerPage`: Results per page (Default: 20)
- `ordering`: Sort field (`id`, `year`, `upload_date` for movies; `id`, `year`, `last_upload_date` for TV)
- `direction`: Sort direction (`asc` or `desc`)
- `query`: Search title (min 3 characters)
- `year`: Filter by release year
- `imdb_id`: Search by IMDb ID

### Player Events / PostMessage API
None documented.

### Integration Notes
- Responsive player compatible with Desktop, Mobile, and Tablet.
- Provides a list of fast streaming servers for user selection.
- Links are automatically updated for quality improvements.

providers.name: NontonGo

providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://www.nontongo.win

### Embed Example
https://www.nontongo.win/embed/movie/129

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `https://www.nontongo.win/embed/movie/{id}`
- **TV Shows (Path)**: `https://www.nontongo.win/embed/tv/{id}/{season}/{episode}`
- **TV Shows (Query)**: `https://www.nontongo.win/embed/tv/?id={id}&s={season}&e={episode}`
- **Anime (AniList)**: `https://nontongo.win/anime/{anilist_id}/{episode}/play`

### Supported IDs

- IMDB
- AniList

### Query Parameters
- `id`: The content ID (TMDB/IMDB/MAL)
- `s`: Season number (for TV)
- `e`: Episode number (for TV/Anime)
- `type`: ID type (e.g., `MAL_ID` for anime)

### Player Events / PostMessage API
None documented.

### Integration Notes

- Provides a dedicated anime streaming path using AniList and MAL IDs.

providers.name: SpenEmbed

providers.name: SuperEmbed
providers.customizations: Supports VIP player access, custom subtitle injection, and IMDB/TMDB ID flexibility.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://multiembed.mov
- Embed Example: https://multiembed.mov/?video_id=129&tmdb=1
- URL Structure:
    - Movies: `/?video_id={id}&tmdb=1`
    - TV Shows: `/?video_id={id}&tmdb=1&s={season}&e={episode}`
- Supported IDs: IMDB (default), TMDB (requires `&tmdb=1` parameter)
- Query Parameters:
    - `video_id`: The IMDB or TMDB ID
    - `tmdb`: Set to `1` to indicate the ID is a TMDB ID
    - `s` or `season`: Season number
    - `e` or `episode`: Episode number
    - `check`: Set to `1` to check if a VIP player is available (returns 0 or 1)
    - `sub_url`: URL to a custom subtitle file (must be urlencoded)
    - `sub_label`: Label for the custom subtitle (must be urlencoded)
- Player Events / PostMessage API: None documented.
- Integration Notes: A VIP player with fewer ads and higher quality is available via the `/directstream.php` endpoint using the same parameter structure.

providers.name: TryEmbed
providers.customizations: Audio format selection (sub/dub), autoplay, auto-skip intro/outro, and a full PostMessage API for external control.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://tryembed.us.cc
- Embed Example: https://tryembed.us.cc/embed/anime/1399/1/sub
- URL Structure:
    - Anime: `/embed/anime/{anilist_id}/{episode}/{lang}` (where lang is `sub` or `dub`)
- Supported IDs: AniList
- Query Parameters:
    - `autoplay`: Set to `true` to force video autoplay
    - `autoSkip`: Set to `true` to automatically bypass intro/outro sequences
    - `startAt`: Timestamp in seconds to begin playback
- Player Events / PostMessage API:
    - Commands (Parent to Iframe):
        - `play` / `pause`: `{}`
        - `seek`: `{ time: number }`
        - `volume`: `{ level: 0.0 to 1.0 }`
    - Events (Iframe to Parent):
        - `PLAYER_EVENT`: Returns `event` and `currentTime` in the data payload
- Integration Notes: Specialized for Anime. For standard Movies or TV shows, the provider redirects users to VidPlays.fun.

providers.name: VidAPI.ru
providers.customizations: Extensive UI color control, remote subtitle injection, and detailed playback state events via postMessage.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://vaplayer.ru

### Embed Example
`https://vaplayer.ru/embed/movie/129`

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `/embed/movie/{id}`
- **TV Shows**: 
  - Numeric: `/embed/tv/{id}/{season}/{episode}`
  - SxxExx: `/embed/tv/{id}/S{season}E{episode}`
  - Dash: `/embed/tv/{id}/{season}-{episode}`
  - Query: `/embed/tv?tmdb={id}&season={season}&episode={episode}`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB (Numeric)
- IMDB (with `tt` prefix)

### Query Parameters
- `color` / `primaryColor` (Hex): Primary UI color
- `title` (String): Custom player title
- `poster` (URL): Custom thumbnail image
- `showTitle` (Boolean): Toggle title overlay
- `startAt` / `resumeAt` (Float): Start playback at specific seconds
- `sub_url` / `sub_file` (URL): Remote subtitle file (.srt, .vtt)
- `sub_label` (String): Subtitle track label
- `sub_lang` (String): Subtitle language code
- `sub_default` (Boolean): Set as default track
- `ds_lang` / `lang` (String): OpenSubtitles auto-search language (ISO 639-1)
- `thumbnails` (URL): Seek bar preview sprite

### Player Events / PostMessage API
Listens for `PLAYER_EVENT` messages containing:
- `player_info`: `imdb`, `tmdb`, `mediaType`, `season`, `episode`, `title`, `poster`
- `player_status`: `playing`, `paused`, `completed`, `seeked`
- `player_progress`: Current time in seconds
- `player_duration`: Total duration in seconds
- `quality`: Current quality label and dimensions

### Integration Notes
- Supports domain whitelisting via dashboard.
- Enforces CSP `frame-ancestors` header.
- Referer and Origin validation performed server-side.

providers.name: VidEasy
providers.customizations: Specialized anime support via AniList IDs and Netflix-style UI overlays.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://player.videasy.net

### Embed Example
`https://player.videasy.net/movie/129`

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `/movie/{tmdb_id}`
- **TV Shows**: `/tv/{tmdb_id}/{season}/{episode}`
- **Anime Shows**: `/anime/{anilist_id}/{episode}`
- **Anime Movies**: `/anime/{anilist_id}`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB (Movies & TV)
- AniList (Anime)

### Query Parameters
- `color` (Hex): Accent color (without # symbol)
- `progress` (Integer): Start time in seconds
- `nextEpisode` (Boolean): Show next episode button
- `episodeSelector` (Boolean): Enable season/episode selector
- `autoplayNextEpisode` (Boolean): Auto-play next episode
- `overlay` (Boolean): Enable Netflix-style pause overlay

### Player Events / PostMessage API
Sends progress updates as JSON strings containing:
- `id`: Content ID
- `type`: `movie`, `tv`, or `anime`
- `progress`: Watch progress percentage
- `timestamp`: Current position in seconds
- `duration`: Total duration in seconds
- `season`/`episode`: For TV/Anime content

### Integration Notes
- Use a responsive 16:9 container for iframes.
- Supports both subbed and dubbed anime versions automatically.

- **TV Shows**: `https://vidflix.club/tv/{tmdb_id}/{season}/{episode}`

providers.name: VidKing
providers.customizations: Custom primary colors, autoplay, TV-specific navigation controls, and start-time offsets.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://www.vidking.net/

### Embed Example
https://www.vidking.net/embed/movie/1078605

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `/embed/movie/{tmdbId}`
- **TV Series**: `/embed/tv/{tmdbId}/{season}/{episode}`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB

### Query Parameters
- `color` (string): Primary color hex code without # (e.g., `ff0000`).
- `autoPlay` (boolean): Enable auto-play (`true`/`false`).
- `nextEpisode` (boolean): Show next episode button for TV shows (`true`/`false`).
- `episodeSelector` (boolean): Enable episode selection menu for TV shows (`true`/`false`).
- `progress` (number): Start time in seconds (e.g., `120`).

### Player Events / PostMessage API
Events are sent via `window.postMessage` in a `PLAYER_EVENT` type object:
- `timeupdate`: Continuous progress updates.
- `play`: Video starts.
- `pause`: Video pauses.
- `ended`: Video ends.
- `seeked`: User seeks to a new time.

**Data Structure**: Includes `currentTime`, `duration`, `progress`, `id`, `mediaType`, `season`, and `episode`.

### Integration Notes
- **Storage**: Uses isolated `localStorage` per configuration to avoid conflicts.
- **Performance**: Optimized using HLS.js.

providers.name: VidLink
providers.customizations: Deep UI customization (colors, icons), player engine selection (JWPlayer), and external subtitle injection.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://vidlink.pro/

### Embed Example
https://vidlink.pro/movie/786892

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `https://vidlink.pro/movie/{tmdbId}`
- **TV Shows**: `https://vidlink.pro/tv/{tmdbId}/{season}/{episode}`
- **Anime**: `https://vidlink.pro/anime/{MALid}/{number}/{subOrDub}`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB (Movies & TV)
- MyAnimeList (Anime)

### Query Parameters
- `primaryColor` (string): Hex color for sliders/controls (e.g., `B20710`).
- `secondaryColor` (string): Hex color for progress bar background.
- `iconColor` (string): Hex color for player icons.
- `icons` (string): Icon set style (`vid` or `default`).
- `title` (boolean): Show/hide media title (`true`/`false`).
- `poster` (boolean): Show/hide poster image (`true`/`false`).
- `autoplay` (boolean): Auto-start playback (`true`/`false`).
- `nextbutton` (boolean): Show next episode button at 90% progress (`true`/`false`).
- `player` (string): Player engine (`jw` for JWPlayer or `default`).
- `startAt` (number): Start time in seconds.
- `sub_file` (string): Direct link to external VTT subtitle file.
- `sub_label` (string): Label for the external subtitle track.
- `fallback_url` (string): Redirect URL if stream fails.
- `fallback` (boolean): For anime, force fallback to sub/dub if type not found (`?fallback=true`).

### Player Events / PostMessage API
- **MEDIA_DATA**: Sends metadata and watch progress for "Continue Watching" features.
- **PLAYER_EVENT**: Tracks interactions (`play`, `pause`, `seeked`, `ended`, `timeupdate`).

### Integration Notes
- Supports professional JWPlayer integration.
- External VTT subtitle support via query parameters.

providers.name: VidNest
providers.customizations: Extensive UI element hiding via query parameters and server selection.
providers.llm_profile:
### Base URL
https://vidnest.fun/

### Embed Example
https://vidnest.fun/movie/129

### URL Structure
- **Movies**: `https://vidnest.fun/movie/[TMDB_ID]`
- **TV Shows**: `https://vidnest.fun/tv/[TMDB_ID]/[SEASON]/[EPISODE]`
- **Anime**: `https://vidnest.fun/anime/[ANILIST_ID]/[EPISODE]/[SUB_OR_DUB]`
- **AnimePahe**: `https://vidnest.fun/animepahe/[ANILIST_ID]/[EPISODE]/[SUB_OR_DUB]`

### Supported IDs
- TMDB (Movies & TV)
- AniList (Anime)

### Query Parameters
- `startAt` / `progress`: Start playback at N seconds.
- `server`: Force initial server. Values: `lamda`, `primesrc`, `sigma`, `alfa`, `beta`, `gama`, `catflix`, `hexa`, `delta`.
- **UI Toggles** (Set to `hide`, `false`, `0`, or `off` to hide):
    - `servericon`, `topcaption`, `topsettings`, `centerseekbackward`, `centerplay`, `centerseekforward`, `timeslider`, `mute`, `volume`, `timegroup`, `bottomcaption`, `bottomsettings`, `pip`, `cast`, `fullscreen`, `prevepisode` (TV), `nextepisode` (TV).

### Player Events / PostMessage API
- **Progress Tracking**: Event-driven system monitoring `play`, `pause`, and `seeked` events for persistent resume functionality.

### Integration Notes
- Use `iframe` with `allowFullScreen` and `frameBorder="0"`.

providers.name: VidUP
providers.customizations: Extensive UI control via query parameters including theme colors, server selection, and visibility toggles for posters and titles.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://vidup.to
- Embed Example: https://vidup.to/movie/129
- URL Structure:
    - Movies: `/movie/{id}`
    - TV Shows: `/tv/{id}/{season}/{episode}`
- Supported IDs: TMDB, IMDB
- Query Parameters:
    - `title`: Controls whether the media title is displayed
    - `poster`: Determines if the poster image is shown
    - `autoPlay`: Controls whether the media starts playing automatically
    - `startAt`: Starts the video at the specified time in seconds
    - `theme`: Changes the player's color (hex code format)
    - `server`: Changes the default server for the player
    - `hideServer`: Controls whether the server selector button is shown
    - `fullscreenButton`: Controls whether the fullscreen button is shown
    - `chromecast`: Controls whether the Chromecast button is shown or hidden
    - `sub`: Sets the default subtitle (e.g., en, es, fr)
- Player Events / PostMessage API: None documented
- Integration Notes: Supports both IMDB and TMDB identifiers for content lookup.

providers.name: Vidzen
providers.customizations: Customizable server selection and a robust PostMessage API for tracking user watch progress.
providers.llm_profile:
- Base URL: https://vidzen.fun
- Embed Example: https://vidzen.fun/movie/129
- URL Structure:
    - Movies: `/movie/{tmdb_id}`
    - TV Shows: `/tv/{tmdb_id}/{season}/{episode}`
- Supported IDs: TMDB
- Query Parameters:
    - `server`: Provider to use (HyroX, HyroXSRC, or HyroXMP4). Auto fallback enabled.
    - `startAt`: Start playback at a specific timestamp in seconds
    - `autoplay`: Boolean to automatically start playback
    - `muted`: Boolean to start playback muted
- Player Events / PostMessage API: Listens for `message` events from `https://vidzen.fun`. Sends `MEDIA_DATA` type containing title, poster, backdrop, and detailed watch progress (time watched, duration, last episode).
- Integration Notes: Uses a multi-provider failover system. Progress can be tracked and stored in localStorage using the provided JS snippet.
